MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVDHARA, V.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-13-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-26-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WRIGHT, CONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 130 EDDY STREET #310, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 $950.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $950.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-05-1999, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS THROUGH STIPULATION DATE. SHOULD DEFENDANT PAY THE JUDGMENT SUM BY 5 P.M. ON MAY 3, 1999, THEN THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL AND DEFENDANT SHALL BE ALLOWED TO STAY.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.86 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVDHARA, V.D.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, CONNIE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT WRIGHT, CONNIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT COURT REPORTER HELEN SOREP- MATLEY COURT CLERK JOYCE WEIR 3:00 PM JUDGEMENT, IN THIS CASE, WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, V.D. DEVDHARA SHALL BE AWARDED RENT AND DAMAGES OF $950.00 FROM DEFENDANT, CONNIE WRIGHT, AND RETURN OF POSSESSION OF 130 EDDY STREET, #310, SAN FRANCISCO. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ENTER IMMEDIATELY BUT WILL BE STAYED UNTIL 5-5-99, 9AM. DEFENDANT WRIGHT SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES AT 130 EDDY STREET, #310, SAN FRANCISCO, BY 5-3-99, 5PM. THERE WILL BE A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. MS. CONNIE WRIGHT IS THE ONLY OCCUPANT OF 130 EDDY STREET, #310, SAN FRANCISCO EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COURT COSTS.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, CONNIE
